text: Yes! I finally realized that I can't do it!
I can't do it, Mr. Krabs! I'm a failure
Don't you get it, you crustaceous cheapskate?
I can't make a Double Krabby Patty with the works!
I can't put a patty on a bun, with lettuce, cheese, onions, tomatoes,
ketchup, mustard, pickles, and top bun together in that order!
